title: Hali ya Hewa na Hisia
description: Learn weather vocabulary and how to express emotions in everyday conversation.
description_sw: Jifunze maneno ya hali ya hewa na jinsi ya kuelezea hisia katika mazungumzo ya kawaida.
sofia_intro: Today we learn how to describe the weather and express how we feel. This helps you start conversations with anyone, anywhere!
sofia_intro_sw: Leo tutajifunza jinsi ya kuelezea hali ya hewa na jinsi unavyojisikia. Hii itakusaidia kuanzisha mazungumzo na watu wapya kila siku!

lessons.title: Weather Vocabulary
lessons.sofia_hint: Click each weather word to hear it. These are common small-talk topics!
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Bonyeza kila neno la hali ya hewa kulisikia. Hii ni mazungumzo ya kawaida!

lessons.title: Feelings and Emotions
lessons.sofia_hint: Click each emotion word to hear it. Express yourself!
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Bonyeza kila neno la hisia kulisikia. Jieleze!

words.example: I am thirsty. Can I have water?
I am excited about the project.

lessons.title: Weather and Feelings Quiz
lessons.title_sw: Mchezo wa Hali ya Hewa na Hisia
lessons.sofia_hint: Choose the correct word to complete each sentence.
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Chagua neno sahihi kukamilisha kila sentensi.

questions.prompt: The water is ________. (Maji ni ya baridi)
questions.prompt_sw: The water is ________. (Maji ni ya baridi)

questions.prompt: I am ________ about the new job. (Nina furahi kuhusu kazi mpya)
questions.prompt_sw: I am ________ about the new job. (Nina furahi kuhusu kazi mpya)

questions.prompt: Which emotion is the opposite of 'Happy'? (Hisia ipi ni kinyume cha 'Happy'?)
questions.prompt_sw: Which emotion is the opposite of 'Happy'? (Hisia ipi ni kinyume cha 'Happy'?)

questions.prompt: The clouds are ________ today. (Mingu ni matope leo)
questions.prompt_sw: The clouds are ________ today. (Mingu ni matope leo)

questions.prompt: I am ________ because I did not sleep. (Nimechoka kwa sababu sikufa)
questions.prompt_sw: I am ________ because I did not sleep. (Nimechoka kwa sababu sikufa)

questions.prompt: Which word describes a sunny day? (Neno gani linaelezea siku yenye jua?)
questions.prompt_sw: Which word describes a sunny day? (Neno gani linaelezea siku yenye jua?)

questions.prompt: 'I am tired and hungry' means: (Kauli 'I am tired and hungry' inamaanisha:)
questions.prompt_sw: 'I am tired and hungry' means: (Kauli 'I am tired and hungry' inamaanisha:)

questions.prompt: What is the best response to 'How do you feel?' (Jibu bora la 'How do you feel?' ni lipi?)
questions.prompt_sw: What is the best response to 'How do you feel?' (Jibu bora la 'How do you feel?' ni lipi?)

questions.prompt: 'Huzuni' in English is: ('Huzuni' kwa Kiingereza ni:)
questions.prompt_sw: 'Huzuni' in English is: ('Huzuni' kwa Kiingereza ni:)

questions.prompt: You can say 'It is ________ and rainy' (Unaweza kusema 'It is ________ and rainy')
questions.prompt_sw: You can say 'It is ________ and rainy' (Unaweza kusema 'It is ________ and rainy')
